quote: Chris saved my business! My hard drive failed right before a big client presentation and he recovered all my data within hours. Absolute lifesaver.
As a small business owner, having reliable IT support is crucial. Chris is my go-to — responsive, knowledgeable, and always fixes the issue the first time.
I'm not particularly tech-savvy, but Chris explained everything clearly and patiently. My network is now faster and more secure than ever.
Called Chris at 9PM with a critical server issue. He remoted in within 15 minutes and had us back online before midnight. Outstanding service.
Migrated our entire office to Microsoft 365 without a single hiccup. Chris planned everything perfectly — zero downtime.
Set up our whole home network, NAS, and VPN. Everything just works. Would not trust anyone else with my tech.
Fast, fair, and honest. Told me my laptop just needed a $30 part instead of a $500 replacement. That kind of integrity is rare.
The remote support session was seamless. Chris fixed my email configuration issue in under 30 minutes. Great experience.
Chris has been managing IT for my studio for two years. Fewer outages, better backups, and total peace of mind.
Recovered photos I thought were gone forever from a water-damaged phone. Incredible work — highly recommend.
